description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs cargo doc and then moves the generated documentation with mv target/doc/ public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a test:cargo job in the test stage that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, then cargo build --all && cargo build --examples, and finally cargo test --all --verbose. No caches, services, or additional variables are required.
